data.body: Kickoff /rebar-implement for epic 2141-0ba0-5313-48d4 (horoscopic-jaded-zebradove) 'Ticket audit-trail UI'. TREE: epic 2141 -> 2 code-changing leaf stories: Story A a3d7 (cultivated-aquatic-crow) server scaffolding [ui] extra + UiConfig + lazy FastAPI + loopback + index (STACK BOTTOM); Story F ff6f (depressant-amethyst-wasp) per-ticket /ticket/<id> audit page, depends_on A (STACK TOP). Both gates ON; all 3 tickets have valid plan-review attestations. BLOCKER ba33 (data-enrichment) in_progress but landed on origin/main; verifying read layer/enriched fields in code first. LANDING: rebar/Gerrit stacked changes, close each leaf after Verified+1, submit top when all green. WORKTREE .claude/worktrees/audit-ui @ origin/main 5a39f85eb, venv active, web deps installed.
